name: Sesame Steak Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the sesame seeds on a dry skillet until fragrant.
2. Crush or grind the sesame seeds until most are powdery.
3. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and blend well to ensure an even consistency.
4. The sauce will yield about 1/3 cup and can be stored for short periods in the refrigerator.
5. Serve over slices of grilled flank steak or London broil.
